name: Ninja Robots
overview: One day, Joe Maya, who lives on Mars, witnesses a battle between  aliens. Those from Planet Zaboom are attacking the princess of Planet  Radorio, she has escaped from the emperor of Zaboom who is scheming to  conquer the universe and has crash landed on mars. Joe stumbles aboard  the princesses ship, this starts a chain reaction of events that will  alter their lives. Joe and his friends wield three powerful mecha beasts  against the emperor of Zaboom and his forces, but the odds are stacked  heavily against them. When all hope seems to be lost a mysterious ninja  robot named Tobikage appears as if from nowhere to provide assitance,  able to combine with the 3 mechanical beasts provides Tobikage with  unmatched power, with his aide Joe fights the forces of Zaboom...
